name: Twice-Baked Potatoes (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce well-scrubbed potatoes twice. Place 1 inch apart on a paper towel in the oven.
2. Microwave at HIGH for 10½ to 12½ minutes, or until just softened, rearranging and turning over after half the cooking time.
3. Let stand, covered with a bowl, for 5 minutes.
4. Place bacon on a paper towel-lined plate. Cover with a paper towel.
5. Microwave at HIGH for 5 to 6 minutes, or until crisp. Drain on a paper towel; crumble.
6. In a 2-quart casserole dish, combine butter and onion. Cover and microwave at HIGH for 1½ to 2 minutes, or until butter is melted and onion is tender.
7. Cut potatoes in half lengthwise. Scoop out the center and place it in the casserole with onion-butter mixture and crumbled bacon.
8. Add milk, salt, pepper; mash until fluffy.
9. Spoon into potato shells.
10. Arrange on a paper towel-lined microwaveable baking sheet. Sprinkle with paprika.
11. Microwave at HIGH for 3 to 7 minutes, or until heated, rotating the tray halfway through. Garnish with additional chopped green onion if desired.
